_meta.dna: mobile(ios) = pwa(installable) x capacitor(native) x appstore(distribution) x offline(resilient) x notification(push) x auth(faceid) x responsive(adaptive)
_meta.question_expansion_instruction: Each floor has 7 seed questions from a distinct iOS user persona. Questions must verify that the Solace platform works as a real, installable iOS app — not just a responsive website viewed in Safari.

name: Tower of Mobile Apps (iOS/iPhone)
protocol: FORECAST -> CROSS-REF -> AUDIT(7q) -> FIX -> VERIFY -> SEAL -> POSTMORTEM

floors.persona_context: 36, San Francisco, Marketing Director at a tech company, Intermediate tech, iPhone 15 Pro as primary device, wants App Store install, Face ID login, and iCloud Keychain integration for seamless authentication
questions: Can I find Solace in the Apple App Store and install it with one tap like any other iPhone app?
After installing, does the app launch with a native iOS splash screen and feel like a real iPhone app — not a web page?
Can I log in using Face ID instead of typing my password every time I open the app?
Does the app offer to save my credentials to iCloud Keychain so I can log in seamlessly across my iPhone, iPad, and Mac?
Can I run Gmail Inbox Triage entirely from my iPhone without needing a desktop?
Does the app respect iOS conventions: swipe-to-go-back, pull-to-refresh, haptic feedback on actions?
Can I use Siri to open Solace or trigger a quick action like 'Hey Siri, run my morning triage'?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Emily is a mainstream iPhone user who expects App Store install, Face ID, and iCloud Keychain integration. Questions verify that the app feels native and works with iOS ecosystem features.

floors.persona_context: 30, Osaka, iOS Developer at a fintech startup, Expert tech, Pro tier, wants Universal Links, App Clips, Shortcuts integration, and SwiftUI compatibility for deep platform integration
questions: Does the app register Universal Links so that https://solaceagi.com/task/12345 opens directly in the app instead of Safari?
Is there an App Clip that lets new users try a basic task (e.g., email summary) without installing the full app?
Does the app expose Shortcuts actions so users can create custom automations in the Shortcuts app?
Is the Capacitor bridge properly configured so native iOS APIs (camera, files, HealthKit) are accessible from the web layer?
Does the app handle iOS URL schemes (solace://) for deep linking from other apps?
Can I attach a debugger via Xcode and inspect the WKWebView using Safari Web Inspector?
Are the Capacitor iOS plugin versions documented and compatible with the latest Xcode and iOS SDK?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Kenji is an iOS developer who wants deep platform integration. Questions verify Universal Links, App Clips, Shortcuts, SwiftUI compatibility, and developer tooling.

floors.persona_context: 52, Dublin, University Professor using iPad Pro 12.9 as primary work device, Intermediate tech, Pro tier, needs Split View, multitasking, Apple Pencil annotation, and Stage Manager support
questions: Does the app support iPad Split View so I can run Solace side-by-side with my lecture notes?
Does the app properly adapt its layout to the iPad's larger screen — using the space, not just scaling up the iPhone layout?
Can I use Slide Over to quickly check task status without leaving my current app?
Does the app work with Stage Manager on iPadOS 16+ for windowed multitasking?
Can I use Apple Pencil to annotate or mark up evidence screenshots within the app?
Does the app support drag-and-drop to move content between Solace and other iPad apps?
Does the keyboard shortcut Cmd+F work for search within the app when using an external keyboard?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Margaret uses an iPad Pro as her primary device. Questions verify Split View, multitasking, Apple Pencil, Stage Manager, and external keyboard support on iPadOS.

floors.persona_context: 47, Stockholm, Head of Security at a Nordic bank, Expert security, Enterprise tier, must ensure the iOS app meets financial industry security standards before approving deployment to 500 employees
questions: Are OAuth3 tokens and credentials stored in the iOS Keychain (Secure Enclave backed) rather than UserDefaults or plain files?
Does the app enforce App Transport Security (ATS) with no exceptions — all network calls over TLS 1.2+?
Is data protection set to NSFileProtectionComplete so that files are encrypted when the device is locked?
Does the app detect jailbroken devices and warn or restrict functionality to prevent token extraction?
Can I enforce biometric + passcode authentication via MDM policy before the app displays any data?
Does the app prevent sensitive data from appearing in the iOS app switcher snapshot?
Is the app binary protected against reverse engineering with code obfuscation and anti-tampering checks?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Henrik manages security for a bank. Questions verify Keychain storage, ATS enforcement, data protection, jailbreak detection, and MDM compatibility on iOS.

floors.persona_context: 25, Barcelona, Mobile QA Engineer, Expert tech, tests across iPhone SE to iPhone 15 Pro Max, focused on launch time, memory footprint, battery impact, and App Store size limits
questions: Does the app launch from cold (killed state) to interactive home screen in under 2 seconds on iPhone SE (3rd gen)?
Does the app's memory usage stay under 150MB during normal operation as reported by Xcode Instruments?
Is the app download size under 50MB to allow cellular download without the App Store size warning?
Does the app avoid excessive battery drain — verified by showing minimal Background Activity in iOS Battery settings?
Does scrolling through task lists and evidence maintain 60fps on older devices (iPhone 11)?
Are images and heavy assets loaded lazily so the initial screen renders quickly even on slow LTE?
Does MetricKit / Xcode Organizer show zero hang rate and healthy launch time percentiles?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Sofia tests on a range of iPhones from SE to Pro Max. Questions verify launch time, memory, app size, battery impact, and smooth rendering across device tiers.

floors.persona_context: 44, Boston, Accessibility Specialist who is blind, uses VoiceOver as primary interaction method, Expert in iOS accessibility, evaluates apps for WCAG 2.1 AA and Apple HIG compliance
questions: Can I navigate every screen and interact with every control using VoiceOver gestures without getting trapped?
Does the app respect the Dynamic Type setting — scaling text up to Accessibility sizes without layout breakage?
Are color accommodations (Increase Contrast, Reduce Transparency, Differentiate Without Color) properly supported?
Does Switch Control work for users who cannot use touch — can every action be triggered via switch scanning?
Are custom actions and rotor items provided for complex interactions (e.g., swipe actions on task cards)?
Does the app support Bold Text and Reduce Motion accessibility preferences?
Are all status indicators (pass/fail, active/inactive, error) conveyed through text labels or icons in addition to color?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: James is blind and uses VoiceOver as his primary interaction method. Questions verify VoiceOver navigation, Dynamic Type, color accommodations, and Switch Control on iOS.

floors.persona_context: 38, Taipei, Product Manager experienced in App Store submissions, Expert in Apple review guidelines, manages TestFlight, screenshots, in-app purchases, and compliance across 15 markets
questions: Does the app comply with Apple's App Review Guidelines — no private API usage, no hidden functionality, clear purpose?
Are App Store screenshots provided for all required device sizes (6.7", 6.1", 5.5" iPhone + iPad)?
Is TestFlight configured with internal and external testing groups for beta distribution?
Are in-app purchases (Pro subscription) properly configured with StoreKit and server-side receipt validation?
Does the app include a privacy nutrition label that accurately describes data collection practices?
Are release notes localized for all supported languages and published with each version update?
Does the app handle the App Store review process gracefully — demo account provided, no login walls during review?
floors.question_expansion_instruction: Mei-Ling manages App Store submissions across markets. Questions verify review guideline compliance, screenshots, TestFlight, in-app purchases, and privacy labels.
